# Application Integration & Management Icons

## Application Integration (`#E7157B`)

### resourceIcon (service-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.<resIcon>`
Required: `fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff`

| Display Name | resIcon |
|---|---|
| Application Integration | `application_integration` |
| API Gateway | `api_gateway` |
| AppFlow | `appflow` |
| AppSync | `appsync` |
| B2B Data Interchange | `b2b_data_interchange` |
| EventBridge | `eventbridge` |
| Express Workflows | `express_workflow` |
| Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow | `managed_workflows_for_apache_airflow` |
| MQ | `mq` |
| Simple Notification Service (SNS) | `sns` |
| Simple Queue Service (SQS) | `sqs` |
| Step Functions | `step_functions` |
| Console Mobile Application | `mobile_application` |

### Dedicated shapes (resource-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.<shape>`
Required: `fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none`

| Display Name | shape |
|---|---|
| API Gateway Endpoint | `endpoint` |
| Email Notification | `email_notification` |
| Event | `event` |
| EventBridge Pipes | `eventbridge_pipes` |
| Custom Event Bus | `eventbridge_custom_event_bus_resource` |
| Default Event Bus | `eventbridge_default_event_bus_resource` |
| SaaS Partner Event | `eventbridge_saas_partner_event_bus_resource` |
| EventBridge Scheduler | `eventbridge_scheduler` |
| EventBridge Schema | `eventbridge_schema` |
| EventBridge Schema Registry | `eventbridge_schema_registry` |
| MQ Broker | `mq_broker` |
| Topic (SNS) | `topic` |
| Message (SQS) | `message` |
| Queue (SQS) | `queue` |
| Rule | `rule_3` |
| Event Resource | `event_resource` |
| HTTP Notification | `http_notification` |
